title: iberis umbellata
intro: Iberis umbellata, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Iberis umbellata include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
